urdu transliteration text:
Hum jo ye ehtemaam karte hain,
Apna uncha makaam karte hain
english translation text:
The preparation and planning that we do (for this celebration)
Raises our status and position
(in the hereafter)

urdu transliteration text:
Jashne Haider manaane waalon ko
Arsh waale salaam karte hain
english translation text:
The ones who honor and celebrate Haider (as)…
Those who have the highest status in heaven, send them greetings!

urdu transliteration text:
Jab lagaate hai naraa Haider ka
Chaand taare salaam karte hain
english translation text:
When the call of “Naare Haideri”
is made…
The moon and the stars send greetings (to those who are present)

urdu transliteration text:
Eidon ke liye hai eid ka din,
Ghar ghar ko sajaya jaata hai
english translation text:
Today is the day of Eid, for the rest of the Eid days
Homes are being embellished and decorated (for this celebration)!

urdu transliteration text: Eidon ke liye hai eid ka din
english translation text: Today is the day of Eid, for the rest of the Eid days

urdu transliteration text: Eidon ke liye hai eid ka din, Ghar ghar ko sajaya jaata hai
english translation text:
Today is the day of Eid, for the
rest of the Eid days..
Homes are being embellished and decorated (for this celebration)

urdu transliteration text:
Maula ko maula maidaan me,
Mimber pe banaya jaata hai
english translation text:
Our master is on the desert
(of Ghadeer)
He is being crowned (as the successor) on the pulpit
(by the Prophet (saw))

urdu transliteration text: Eidon ke liye hai eid ka din
english translation text: Today is the day of Eid, for the rest of the Eid days

urdu transliteration text:
Jab zikr e ali ka hota hai,
Jab unki baate hoti hai
english translation text:
When Ali (as) is praised and honored
When he is spoken of and remembered

urdu transliteration text:
Lagtaa hai jaise urdu mein,
Quran sunaya jaata hai
english translation text: It’s as if the Quran is being recited in Urdu!

urdu transliteration text: Eidon ke liye hai eid ka din
english translation text: Today is the day of Eid, for the rest of the Eid days

urdu transliteration text:
Kya khub sama hai ehle nazar,
Hai daste nabi per yun haider
english translation text:
What a beautiful sight it is for those who can see
On the shoulders of the Prophet (saw) is Haider (as)

urdu transliteration text:
Jis tarha gawahi dene ko,
Quran uthaya jaata hai
english translation text: In the same manner that a witness would raise the Quran in a court of law!

urdu transliteration text: Eidon ke liye hai eid ka din
english translation text: Today is the day of Eid, for the rest of the Eid days

urdu transliteration text:
Sooraj ki tapish sehra ki tapish,
Har us pe wilayat ka elaan
english translation text:
The heat of the sun and the scorching dessert
And in addition, the announcement of the Wilayat

urdu transliteration text:
Kya roz hai aaj munafiq ko,
Har rukh se jalaya jaata hai
english translation text:
What a woeful day for the hypocrites
They’re being inflamed from every direction!

urdu transliteration text: Eidon ke liye hai eid ka din
english translation text: Today is the day of Eid, for the rest of the Eid days

urdu transliteration text:
Elaan wilayat ki khatir,
Fitrat ko badalta hai khaliq
english translation text: For the sake of the WilayatThe Creator changes the course of nature

urdu transliteration text:
Andho ko dikhaya jaata hai,
Behro ko sunaya jaata hai
english translation text: The blind can see and the deaf can hear!

urdu transliteration text: Eidon ke liye hai eid ka din
english translation text: Today is the day of Eid, for the rest of the Eid days

urdu transliteration text:
Hum Naad-e-Ali jab parhte hai,
Kyun jalte ho ye fitrat hai
english translation text:
Why do you question us when we recite Naad-e-Ali?!
It’s in our nature (to recite it)

urdu transliteration text:
Jab mushkil sar par aati hai,
Apno ko bulaya jaata hai
english translation text: When in difficulty, one calls upon those who are beloved to them!

urdu transliteration text: Eidon ke liye hai eid ka din
english translation text: Today is the day of Eid, for the rest of the Eid days
